sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String DEFAULT 'unknown', created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
SELECT id, name, created_at FROM test_table WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Charlie' WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE new_table AS SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE name != 'unknown' ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
